Ssra's Bloodstone Eyepatch  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: FACE
AC: 35
STR: +10 WIS: +15 INT: +15 HP: +75 MANA: +75 ENDUR: +75
SV FIRE: +8 SV DISEASE: +8 SV COLD: +8 SV MAGIC: +8 SV POISON: +8
Effect: Truesight (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: FACE
AC: 35
STR: +10 WIS: +15 INT: +15 HP: +75 MANA: +75 ENDUR: +75
SV FIRE: +8 SV DISEASE: +8 SV COLD: +8 SV MAGIC: +8 SV POISON: +8
Effect: Truesight (Worn, Casting Time: Instant)
WT: 0.0 Size: TINY

Race: ALL

Item Type:Armor

Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE

Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 58

RE: If u want good armor, raid VEX THAL!
QuoteReply
# Oct 14 2003 at 5:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591794505832
31 posts
Know your facts before you make silly posts. To even get into Vex Thal you need to quest for the key. And one of the final steps in the key quest to VT is to kill Emperor Ssraeshza himself. And to even get to the emperor you need a key. The key isn't that hard to get but I'm sure the Emperor is tough to kill. Most guilds perfer to raid NTov and do the glyphod cycle which is also in ssra temple before taking on the emperor. Oh and also kill AoW a couple of dozen of times to. This item drops in ToV btw, not Ssra, it just bares its name for some reason.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jun 09 2003 at 12:29 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) nah, hes a Fumdukkin bish
Not for casters?
QuoteReply
# Apr 08 2002 at 2:08 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591762848395
16 posts
Who said the casters sit at the back and have no need for this? As a Shammy, one of best ways to help a group/guild is to slow the mobs, this saves the tanks getting hit so much, saves the Clerics mana on heals and genarally reduces the damage dealt by the mobs, this unfortunatly has a VERY high taunt value and I find myself summoned or agroed by very annoyed mobs. As a hybrid, I dont have 10 million HPs to save me while the cleric CHs me, a few fast hits and I am history. The AC on this item would sure help save my butt and the added WIS would allow me to haste most of the guild, once again saving damage from mobs as they then go down quicker. Yes the main tank does put there life on the line, but so do the casters who try to help them. This Item is great for all classes, so please stop saying in is wasted on any one class, whoever gets it is a lucky person. Gratz to everyone who has one and /salute Jipp

'A shaman is there to help and protect his people. am a Shaman and take this as my creed, attack my people and you attack me'
▲ Page top
#Tangrett, Posted: Nov 20 2002 at 5:14 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) sevenmoons, your a frickkin moron. Its all/all for a reason, everyone has a right to loot this one day or another. Depending on there guilds loot method, and by your post you are in a low level guild that will never even get to see this mob, let alone actully have a chance in hell to loot this item. Much like all you frickkin people who deem an all/all item to be for X class and should never go to another class. Cannot wait to see the day when one of those items you want that you say is for X class goes to the caster. Serves you fawks right.
RE: Not for casters?

# Jun 09 2003 at 3:52 PM Rating: Good

Plus, why did you feel it necessary to resort to name calling, rather than reasoned argument?

# Jun 07 2002 at 10:41 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361662060
196 posts
Since when were Shammies hybrids? You're a priest Sevenmoons :)

As far as those who say that casters sit at the back...quite a few ubermobs resist even wizard Lures from a nice safe distance...I've frequently had to run into melee range (literally standing right behind or next to the MA) to land a nuke. Of course...if I actually draw aggro it's usally because almost everyone but the camped out clerics is dead.

#Anonymous, Posted: Sep 26 2001 at 5:25 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) SCREAM SCREAM YELL YELL RANT RANT
Good for all
QuoteReply
# Sep 26 2001 at 4:06 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591751621060
172 posts
This is perfect for (insert class here).

BAH!

Notice the AC, STR and HP increases? That screams melee classes. You know who you are.

Notice the INT, WIS, and mana bonuses? They make this item ideal for casters, line up here please.

The combination of stats shout out for hybrids to get this. Yup, you all get a chance too.

And the resists? Who doesn't need +8 to all resists?

Now which classes and races are excluded? None? So that means Verant made this item to be used by all players. What a concept, all helped take down Vulak, all get a chance to get this.

# Sep 26 2001 at 2:59 PM Rating: Excellent

268 posts

Come on now
QuoteReply
# Sep 26 2001 at 7:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249444106
146 posts
Look, it really is quite simple for the folks who are killing NToV MOBs like this. The first time it drops, it goes to the Main Tank. Why? Because it helps the entire guild out for *^&*^'s sake.

The next time, it goes to the off-tank, etc. This is not a ploy to ***** anyone, it is just science applied to Norrath. Eventually all will have nice AC items like this but don't give me the "this is best for a Ranger" business. When was the last time your Ranger tanked anything? My top Ranger would laugh in the RL's face if he awarded him this.
▲ Page top
RE: Come on now
QuoteReply
# Jan 21 2002 at 3:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1665361029535
69 posts
When is the last time your ranger was in a non raid situation? Hmm? Ever had him tank something in an xp grind session? I still do.

Roth, 52 ranger
Xev
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 09 2001 at 8:23 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) No doubt, Im glad I read this post, cause I was about to say the same thing. Sure its great for all classes but just look at the AC. Im only a 51 warrior and nothing on me atm is 35 ac. Hell my champs boots got the most AC out of anything im wearing so far. And whose going to be getting hit the most?... definatly not the magician from way up top there, and definatly not a ranger. Clerics might take a hit or 2 but no enough to be considered first in line for this puppy. Tank numero uno gets this first. And in all being fair tank numero dos gets the second. Face it, every class has its puproses and the +to int and wis for casters who use SPELLS!!! I REPEAT SPELLS!!! in order to do battle doesnt help much. By this time all casters all ready have the max wis and int most likely. The AC on here definatly should go to the person who uses nothing but items to be the greatest, and thats the tanks. IE Warriors.
RE: Come on now
QuoteReply
# Sep 26 2001 at 1:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249461149
62 posts
I don't know, whenever I'm using one of my melees, I always feel guilty taking something that has a lot of Int, Wis or Mana. I would be happy to let this go to the Cleric... provided I got healed and ressurected at the end of it all.

Why?
QuoteReply
# Sep 26 2001 at 7:44 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
First one of this that dropped went to a cleric.:\ The mask of warfare is probably better for true melees (10 more stam, 25 more hp/mana for 5 less ac). Some people with capped out stamina might take this, but a lot will want to hold off for the better loot and just settle for a secondary mask like ancient pirate's.

monkeys
QuoteReply
# Sep 26 2001 at 6:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752546644
2 posts
Most of you people will never see it drop anyway, so what does it matter who gets it? It'll never be your decision. Any guild that takes him down has a point system, so whoever wants it and has enough points is going to get it. Don't ever expect to camp this like fbss and expect to random for it.

RE: monkeys
QuoteReply
# Sep 27 2001 at 1:27 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Speak for yourself, Draxx.

It "matters" because the well-informed raid leaders peruse these sights (myself included), reading comments from various posters about who would best benefit from particular items, and then making informed decisions as to which classes (and sometimes races) are to random and/or allowed to use 'raid points'

My guild, in cooperation with 2 others, does camp ToV, HoT and North Wing- many do.

Your post had nothing to do with Monks, either, btw.

This Mask *screams* Hybrid to me, Caster/Priest second, and Melee lastly.

Go figure.

LACK of NEW items for MID levels
QuoteReply
# Sep 25 2001 at 7:41 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
WHY is it, that this game seems to have left the MID levels out in the cold? Either you have to be BELOW 35 or ABOVE 50 to get any of the new GOOD stuff. What happened to the rest of us, still trying to struggle through those levels inbetween? I have seen nothing new for us, therefore find the game becoming more boring. Looking forward to Dark Ages of Camelot coming out. MAYBE they will take into account ALL level players....
▲ Page top
(not new)
QuoteReply
# Sep 26 2001 at 11:23 AM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
this isn't exactly a new item, Anon, it's just that Vulak'Aerr is JUST NOW being killed.
you need to clear all of the named dragons in tov in order to get to Vulak, otherwise they will all run in to assist him.. dragons with all kinds of fun AE's.. like gflux+throw(like cazic, fun!) mana drain, disease based DD+slow...
I've been to tov a few times, I've seen the best of guilds fail at some of these dragons.. multiple times if it was their first shot at it.. trust me, this item is VERY earned by anyone who can clear all of north tov and finally kill him

I find this post to be so funny. Form a guild and march on ToV north wing? Are you nuts? Forming and equiping a guild to take these mobs is not easy. Oh one more thing it frees up other slots for resist gear so at some point you could have 200int + 200 each resist +200 cha for enc so don't complain.

Either she's stuck up and won't look at you unless you have at least a 6 figure income or she's also got the LOWEST self esteem in the bar and will do just about anything for you once she's drunk and you're telling her how beautiful she is.

QuoteReply
# Nov 09 2001 at 11:20 AM Rating: Decent
-REDACTED-
64 posts
Sound like kids to me....

went from a piece in the game to picking up chics in a bar...go figure /shrug

most people in these posts are doing nothing but flamming each other. Who gives a ****, tell us about the item not who's bigger, badder, and better than who because I really don't care about that.

What the hell is the top ten magician thing...did he win a best of the best? Come on now, sounds like "My daddy can beat your daddy". Grow up!

cya!

# Sep 25 2001 at 3:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570556750
57 posts
I suppose it will fit nicely all that can find use for those wis and int... not only casters. Would be nice for CLR, SHD, PAL, RNG, SHM, DRU, casters and ya a monk too... but doubt any MNK will get this too easy cause of the WIS/INT.

This is most useful to a person that is at high risk of melee damage (heal/cast/pull/stun(read push) - agro) and wouldn't waste the nice WIS/INT stats.

I just hope the guild(s) that get this decide who to give it to before the server crashes or the corpse rotts.

Very nice. From a tough mob. Grats to the one wearing this :)
